meta.title: Sunset Services — Aurora & Naperville Landscaping & Hardscape
meta.description: Family-run landscaping, hardscape, and snow management for residential and commercial properties across DuPage County. 25+ years. Free estimates.

hero.h1: Outdoor spaces, built to last 25+ years.
hero.sub: Premium hardscape, full-service landscaping, and snow management across DuPage County. Family-run, Unilock-authorized, since 2000.
hero.alt: Paver patio with a stone fire feature at golden hour, surrounded by mature plantings.

audience.sub: Self-segment by property type — every audience gets the team and the playbook that fits.

residential.desc: Lawn care, design, and seasonal services for the home you're proud of.
residential.alt: A curated home lawn with mature plantings and a paver walkway in late spring.

commercial.desc: Year-round maintenance and snow management for properties that can't afford to look untended.
commercial.alt: Clean turf and defined planting beds at the front of a commercial property in mid-day light.

hardscape.desc: Paver patios, retaining walls, and outdoor kitchens. Unilock-authorized, 25 years building.
hardscape.alt: A paver patio with a stone fire feature in warm late-afternoon light.

services.h2: Built for the property, not the brochure.
services.sub: Nine of our most-asked services. Sixteen total — the audience landings cover the rest.

alt.lawnCare: Freshly mowed lawn with crisp edges in mid-afternoon light.
alt.patios: A paver patio with mortared joints, leading to a walkway through plantings.
alt.walls: A multi-tier retaining wall in cut stone, holding a sloped backyard.
alt.design: A landscape design plan rendered on paper next to plant cuttings.
alt.trees: An arborist trimming a mature tree from a bucket lift.
alt.sprinklers: A sprinkler head misting a green lawn at dusk.
alt.snow: A plowed driveway and walkway after fresh snowfall.
alt.kitchens: An outdoor kitchen with a stone counter, grill, and pendant lighting.
alt.fire: A circular paver fire pit with a wood fire and surrounding seating walls.

social.eyebrow: From the people who hire us
social.aggregateAria: {rating} out of 5 stars on Google, {count} or more reviews

one.quote: They took a backyard slope no one would touch and turned it into our favorite room of the house.
one.name: Sarah K.

two.quote: Snow at 5am, every storm. Drive was clear before I had coffee. Worth every dollar.
two.name: David R.

three.quote: Erick's crew rebuilt our front walk in two days. Cleaner than the day we moved in.
three.name: Patricia M.

about.h2Line2: Run today by his son, Erick.
about.body1: Sunset Services has been mowing lawns, building patios, and clearing snow in DuPage County for 25+ years. Same family, same crew of long-tenure workers, same 6:30am start.
about.body2: Erick took the company over from Nick in 2018 and added the Unilock-authorized hardscape division. Everything else stayed.
about.alt: Erick Solis, owner of Sunset Services, on a job site in Aurora.

projects.h2: Built last season, aging into the property.

alt.napervillePatio: Recently completed paver patio with a built-in fire feature in Naperville.
alt.wheatonLawn: A reseeded lawn with crisp edging on a residential property in Wheaton.
alt.auroraHoa: Maintained landscaping along a commercial frontage in Aurora.
alt.glenEllynFire: A circular fire pit with seating walls in a Glen Ellyn backyard.
alt.lisleWall: A multi-tier retaining wall in cut stone in Lisle.
alt.warrenvilleGarden: A planted garden bed with mature shrubs in Warrenville.

cta.body: Tell us about the property and we'll come measure, sketch, and price it. Free, no obligation, usually within a week.
